creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
I can see both samples installed to /usr/local/share/examples/screen, and that seems reasonable.

However, I am talking about the active screenrc installed to /usr/local/etc.  The port defaults to using the custom screenrc in place of the stock one.  Because of that, the pre-built package also defaults to using the custom screenrc.

D1289 only discusses providing both samples, which is fine.

It looks like D1216 covers more of what I am concerned about.  Though there is no information provided as to why the stock screenrc needed replaced.

Was it intentional to have this be the default screenrc on new installs?
